title: Architecture Concept Template 051
desc: Reusable architecture concept prompt for generating consistent visual outputs with a premium and elegant tone.
prompt_template: Create a {visual_style} image of {subject} in {location}. Use {lens} framing, {lighting} setup, and a {palette} color palette. Keep composition optimized for {output_format} and preserve a {mood} mood.
author: AI Image Prompt Hub Team
final_prompt: Create a photorealistic architecture concept image of a confident young creator in a rain-soaked alley. Use 24mm wide framing, studio three-point lighting, and neutral beige and charcoal color treatment. Output for 4:5 social media crop while maintaining a premium and elegant emotional tone.
